ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "opponent_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the opponent at the time of the game */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "effect" REAL /* Effect of the game on the team's ranking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Counts, Ignored) */,
  "pct_of_ranking" REAL /* Percentage of ranking affected by the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event or tournament */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team won the game */,
  "team_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "opponent_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opponent */,
  "game_score" REAL /* Game score (calculated metric) */,
  "point_difference" INTEGER /* Point difference between the team and the opponent */,
  "opponent_rating" REAL /* Rating of the opponent at the time of the game */,
  "team_rating_postgame" REAL /* Team rating after the game */,
  "game_value" REAL /* Value of the game */,
  "team_rating_pregame" REAL /* Team rating before the game */,
  "game_value_used" REAL /* Value of the game used in calculations */,
  "ratings_impact" REAL /* Impact of the game on team ratings */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that played the game */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number in the season */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location where the game was played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the game */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* JSON array storing the scores for each quarter (or period) of the game */,
  "player_performance" TEXT /* JSON object storing key performance metrics for each player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_event_name FOREIGN KEY ("event_name") REFERENCES events ("event_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_name FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_name") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport played by the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "home_venue" TEXT /* Name of the team's home venue */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport played by the opponent */,
  "rating" REAL /* Current rating of the opponent */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the opponent was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the opponent's logo */,
  "home_venue" TEXT /* Name of the opponent's home venue */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the opponent's team */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the opponent */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the opponent's team captain */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent's assistant coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event or tournament */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., tournament, league game) */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the event */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organization hosting the event */,
  "event_website" TEXT /* URL to the event's official website */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the team's rating */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "rating_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the rating */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
